items.description: No colon in prose; YAML, code, and URLs exempt.
No mid sentence em dash introducing a list or appositive.
No slot filler openers; transitions specific to the substance above.
No decorative pullquotes or signpost subheaders; pedagogical callouts kept.
Drugim rijecima and kin at most once per chapter.
Chapter title separator is an em dash, not a colon.
Bold only for first mention concept anchors.
